name: save_document
description: Create or update a Linear document. If `id` is provided, updates the existing document; otherwise creates a new one. When creating, `title` is required and exactly one parent (`project`, `issue`, `initiative`, `cycle`, or `team`) must be specified. On update, passing a parent reparents the document.

id.description: Document ID or slug to update. Omit to create a new document.

content.description: Content as Markdown. Do not escape the string — use literal newlines and special characters, not escape sequences. To mention a user, use @displayName (e.g., @johndoe)

cycle.description: Cycle name, number, or ID. When passing a name or number, also pass `team` to disambiguate.

team.description: Team name or ID. Attaches the document to the team, unless `cycle` is also passed, in which case it disambiguates the cycle.

icon.description: Icon name or emoji code (e.g. "Rocket" or ":eagle:"), not a raw Unicode emoji
